steps.title: Map the passage sequence
steps.content: The text begins with a broad interest in shipwrecks' ecological effects, then narrows to Whitaker and colleagues' study of wooden shipwrecks in the Gulf of Mexico, and finally reports a finding about microbial diversity and richness.

steps.title: Reject invented structure
steps.content: Choice A invents scholarly attention and a research-team reaction. Choice B makes historical significance central, which the passage does not do. Choice C invents a famous wreck and the wood used to build it. The remaining choice follows the actual sequence. The answer is D.
